preferred_name: Domain - Circuit-breakers and similar equipment for household

preferred_name_ml.en: Domain - Circuit-breakers and similar equipment for household

definition: domain covering protection devices for household with rated currents not exceeding 125 A and rated voltages not exceeding 440 V

definition_ml.en: domain covering protection devices for household with rated currents not exceeding 125 A and rated voltages not exceeding 440 V

note: The domain covers the following device types:, - circuit-breakers and residual current devices of rated currents not exceeding 125 A and rated voltages not exceeding 440 V for protection against overcurrent and/or against electric shock in domestic and similar installations, , - residual current monitors (RCM) for household and similar applications, , - circuit-breakers for equipment of rated currents not exceeding 125 A and rated voltages not exceeding 440 V designed to protect equipment for use in domestic and similar installations, , - control and protection devices for electric vehicle supplies, , - arc fault detection devices (AFDD) of rated currents not exceeding 125 A and rated voltages not exceeding 440 V for household and similar uses,, - automatic reclosing devices, , - power frequency overvoltage protection devices.

note_ml.en: The domain covers the following device types:, - circuit-breakers and residual current devices of rated currents not exceeding 125 A and rated voltages not exceeding 440 V for protection against overcurrent and/or against electric shock in domestic and similar installations, , - residual current monitors (RCM) for household and similar applications, , - circuit-breakers for equipment of rated currents not exceeding 125 A and rated voltages not exceeding 440 V designed to protect equipment for use in domestic and similar installations, , - control and protection devices for electric vehicle supplies, , - arc fault detection devices (AFDD) of rated currents not exceeding 125 A and rated voltages not exceeding 440 V for household and similar uses,, - automatic reclosing devices, , - power frequency overvoltage protection devices.
